children.text: $5 per play.  Players take 12 shots in 45 seconds.  Player must take 4 shots each from 3 designated locations around the basketball court.  1 point earned for each brown basketball made and 2 points earned for each green basketball made.  Players that score at least 4 points will win a prize!
$0.50 per play.  Roll your ball hard enough to get over the first hill, but soft enough that it doesn't come back.  Ball that stays IN the valley wins!

Game requires at least 2 players.  $2 per player.  Race against others by shooting water at a target that light up your balloon.  First balloon to light up completely wins.  There's a winner every race!
2 balls for $1.  Knock all 4 blocks completely off the table with 1 throw and win a large prize.  Knock all 4 blocks completely off the table with 2 throws and win a small prize.
3 balls for $2 or 8 balls for $5.  Toss the softball and try to land the softball in the top of the milk can.  Prizes include our popular Hershey Product Characters!
Game requires at least 2 players.  $2 per player.  Race against others by shooting water at a target to light up your tube.  First tube to light to the top wins!  There's a winner every race!
3 balls for $1.  Knock down 2 out of 3 targets and win a small, knock down 3 out of 3 targets and win a large!  Guests may not combine multiple games to win a prize.
10 rings for $2 or a bucket (50-60 rings) for $5.  Land a ring on a bottle and win a prize.  Ring a brown or gold bottle and win larger prizes!
Things To Do Just For You
